items.title: Why do we need to cut energy use in AI data centers?

bullets: AI model training and inference can drive significant electricity consumption at scale.

takeaways: Plan for growing, concentrated load: evaluate substation, transformer and feeder capacity for AI workloads.

takeaways: For planners and utilities: consider data-center load flexibility as a candidate resource when projecting capacity needs and deferral opportunities.

For procurement and market designers: define clear signals and compensation structures so AI/data workloads can participate without undermining service-level requirements.
